title: Colorless (Black and White)
description: With this lightweight shader, you can turn your world black and white. This Shader also adds Shadows, Fog, light around the player an item like a torch is held and configurable settings.
body:
With this lightweight shader you can turn your world black and white.

Important Notes: 
-The colors are inverted when starting the Shader for the first time, please look into the shader settings
-for better results, turn the brightness down to 0%

![Transition from Black To White](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f70fffa6ec92f8b7f1807ddd644233c1cd5a885.png)

Features:
-turn world black and white
-optimised for PCs with a bad performance
-holding an item like a torch emmits light around the player
-shadows and fog
-colored lighting
-red light around player if hurt (can be deactivated)

Configurable Settings:

-inverted = if true, the colors are inverted

-coloredGlassShadows = if true, the shadows of colored glass are colored

![Colored Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f330d2ffad66223b08bd143323fb255c19d9639.jpeg)

-blacknwhite = if true, the world is black and white

-graytorchlight = if true, items like torches emmit a gray light, else, they give of a orange light

-redRadiusIfHurt = if true, red light appears around the player if hurt
